strengths: 16+ years of full-stack experience with strong TypeScript and Node.js depth, directly matching the primary stack
Active AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq, satisfying the AI agent development requirement explicitly
Deep testing culture demonstrated through TDD practice, authored testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and workshop delivery
concerns: Nest.js is the designated primary backend framework but is not mentioned anywhere in the resume
Kotlin is absent from the skills list; Java appears but without meaningful backend service context matching the secondary stack requirement
Cloud platform depth is unclear — AWS CDK appears at Optilyz but no GCP or Azure exposure, and infrastructure ownership scope is not described
response.justification: Bogdan brings substantial full-stack seniority and directly relevant TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes experience, along with hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling work that few candidates at this level would have. The primary gap is Nest.js, which is the designated backend framework; given his Node.js depth this is learnable but represents an onboarding cost. The Kotlin gap is lower risk given it covers only select services. Overall the profile aligns well with the role's core responsibilities and emerging AI tooling emphasis.
